hero.englishTitle: Tafseel – The Fashion Infrastructure of the Future
hero.subtitle: Web3-powered fashion infrastructure connecting designers, manufacturers, and buyers with Polygon NFTs and BNPL finance.

howItWorks.title: Design
howItWorks.description: Creators upload 3D-ready garments and choose instant NFT minting or immersive storefront deployment.

howItWorks.title: Manufacture
howItWorks.description: Factories receive smart contracts with bill of materials, deliverables, and automated QA checkpoints.

howItWorks.title: Distribute
howItWorks.description: Omnichannel commerce flows to Tafseel Mall, Marketing partners, and Polygon NFT marketplace simultaneously.

howItWorks.title: Settle
howItWorks.description: Tafseel Cash wallet clears TFT ↔ SAR with BNPL partners (Tap, Tamara, Taby) and designer revenue splits.

community.title: Join the Community
community.description: Tap into the Tafseel guild of designers, ateliers, fabric mills, and digital curators building the future of fashion infrastructure.

designer.title: Designer Control Room
designer.subtitle: Upload collections, mint Polygon NFTs, and orchestrate immersive Tafseel Mall storefronts in real time.

manufacturer.title: Manufacturer Operations
manufacturer.subtitle: Smart contracts, production milestones, and live requests from Tafseel designers in one workspace.

nft.title: Polygon NFT Marketplace
nft.subtitle: Collect limited-edition garments, authenticate ownership, and unlock manufacturing rights on-chain.

wallet.title: Tafseel Cash Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Manage TFT stable token, settle manufacturing payouts, and connect BNPL rails instantly.

designSystem.title: Design System
designSystem.subtitle: Typography, palette, motions, and reusable components tuned to the extracted Tafseel DNA.

palette.title: Dynamic Palette
palette.description: Upload a logo to regenerate the live Tailwind tokens for primary, secondary, accent, neutral, surface, and background.
